data.en: We're going to different schools.
data.cn: 我们将要去不同的学校。
accept: We are going to different schools.

data.en: I'm going to Lake Middle School.
accept: I am going to Lake Middle School.

data.en: I'm going to Park Middle School.
accept: I am going to Park Middle School.

data.en: Are you going to Dog Middle School?
A goodbye speech by Lingling.
data.hint: Speech by someone / 某人的演讲

data.en: Dear classmates, we're going to leave our primary school soon.
data.cn: 亲爱的同学们，我们很快就要离开小学了。
accept: Dear classmates, we are going to leave our primary school soon.

data.en: And start middle school this September.
data.cn: 并在今年九月开始中学的学习。

data.en: I'm excited, and also sad.
data.hint: Adjectives connected by 'and' / 'and' 连接形容词
accept: I am excited, and also sad.

data.en: I'm excited because we're going to study Chinese, English and Maths.
data.cn: 我很兴奋因为我们将要学习语文、英语和数学。
accept: I am excited because we are going to study Chinese, English and Maths.

data.en: And learn lots of new things in middle school.
data.cn: 并在中学学习很多新事物。
data.hint: Learn lots of / 学习很多...

data.en: We're also going to meet new friends there.
data.cn: 我们也将会在那里交到新朋友。
data.hint: Meet new friends / 交新朋友
accept: We are also going to meet new friends there.

data.en: At the same time, I'm very sad to say goodbye to you.
data.cn: 同时，我也很伤心要跟你们说再见。
data.hint: At the same time / 同时
accept: At the same time, I am very sad to say goodbye to you.

data.en: My best friends Sam and Amy are going back to the UK.
data.cn: 我最好的朋友萨姆和艾米要回英国了。

data.en: They're going to a new school there.
data.cn: 他们将在那里去一所新学校。
data.hint: Be going to a school / 打算去一所学校
accept: They are going to a new school there.

data.en: I am happy for them.
data.hint: Happy for someone / 为某人高兴
accept: I'm happy for them.

data.en: Four years ago, they spoke only very little Chinese.
data.cn: 四年前，他们只会说一点点中文。
data.hint: Four years ago (Past tense) / 四年前（过去式）

data.en: Now they can speak a lot more.
data.cn: 现在他们能说得更多了。
data.hint: Can + base verb / 能够 + 动词原形

data.en: Keep on practising Chinese in the UK.
data.cn: 在英国要继续练习中文。
data.hint: Keep on doing (British spelling: practising) / 继续做

data.en: And come back to China sometime!
My dear friends, I'll miss you all.
data.cn: 我亲爱的朋友们，我会想念你们所有人的。
accept: My dear friends, I will miss you all.

data.en: Let's write lots of emails to each other!
data.cn: 让我们互相写很多邮件吧！

data.en: We'll always be friends.
data.hint: Always be friends / 永远是朋友
accept: We will always be friends.

data.en: Are you going to middle school this September?
data.cn: 今年九月你要上中学吗？

data.en: Yes, I am.
I'm going to Park Middle School. What about you?
accept: I am going to Park Middle School. What about you?

data.en: What are you going to study?
I'm going to study History, Science, Geography and French.
data.cn: 我打算学习历史、科学、地理和法语。
accept: I am going to study History, Science, Geography and French.

data.en: I'm going to study Physics, Chemistry and Chinese.
data.cn: 我要学习物理、化学和语文。
accept: I am going to study Physics, Chemistry and Chinese.

data.en: I'm also going to study History and Geography.
data.cn: 我也要学习历史和地理。
accept: I am also going to study History and Geography.

data.en: But I'm not going to study French.
data.hint: Negative of 'be going to' / 'be going to' 的否定形式
accept: But I am not going to study French.

data.en: Which middle school do you like? Why?
data.cn: 你喜欢哪所中学？为什么？

data.en: School is nearly finished.
data.cn: 学校生活差不多要结束了。

data.en: It's time to start anew.
accept: It is time to start anew.

data.en: Now I can speak English.
I can speak to you.
data.hint: Speak to someone / 和某人说话

data.en: It's time to say goodbye now.
data.hint: It's time to do / 是时候做...
accept: It is time to say goodbye now.

data.en: School is going to end.
But we can write in English.
data.cn: 但是我们可以用英语写信。

data.en: What are you going to study in middle school?
data.cn: 在中学你打算学习什么？

data.en: He's going to study English.
accept: He is going to study English.

data.en: I'm going to study Chemistry.
accept: I am going to study Chemistry.

data.en: She's going to study Chemistry.
data.hint: Third-person singular 'be' / 第三人称单数 'be'动词
accept: She is going to study Chemistry.

data.en: I'm going to study History.
accept: I am going to study History.

data.en: Are you going to study Physics?
We're going to learn new things.
data.hint: Learn new things / 学习新事物
accept: We are going to learn new things.

data.en: I am excited for middle school.
accept: I'm excited for middle school.

data.en: They are going to meet new friends.
accept: They're going to meet new friends.

data.en: We are going to study Geography.
accept: We're going to study Geography.

data.en: He is going to Park Middle School.
accept: He's going to Park Middle School.

data.en: I will miss you.
data.hint: Will + base verb / will + 动词原形
accept: I'll miss you.
